title: pteryxia albiflora
intro: Pteryxia albiflora, also known as White Flowered Pteryxia, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to the western United States and northern Mexico. The roots and rhizomes of Pteryxia albiflora have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. This plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and is used to treat conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. Pteryxia albiflora can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, and tinctures, which are available in some health food stores and online retailers.
